title: leucanthemopsis spathulifolia
intro: Leucanthemopsis spathulifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved mountain everlasting, is a small perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. Its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Leucanthemopsis spathulifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
